title: Spicy, Glassy-Jelly Dutch Ancho Chilies Mini Casserole
description: A spicy and rich Dutch mini casserole featuring ancho chillies, glaze, and air-fry cooking, perfect for a satisfying dinner.

ingredients.name: Ancho chillies
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste, adjust heat level to personal preference

instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 180°C. Preheat the oven to 180°C. Prepare the ancho chillies by removing seeds and chopping them. Prepare the chicken breast by dicing it into small pieces. Cook the chicken breast in the air fryer for 4 minutes until cooked through, then set aside. Cook the rice according to package instructions. Prepare the glassy-jelly glaze by heating the honey, lemon juice, and olive oil in a saucepan over low heat until smooth. Add the chopped ancho chillies to the saucepan and simmer for 2 minutes. Season with salt and black pepper to taste. In a separate bowl, mix cooked rice with chicken breast pieces and ancho chillies. Spoon the mixture into preheated individual mini cocottes. Drizzle the glassy-jelly glaze over the mixture. Cook in preheated oven for 10 minutes. Serve warm and enjoy!
